instruction: Create an iOS26 SwiftUI view using the new LockScreenCalendarWidget API to show today's events.
Show how to use the new iPadOS26 MultiAppPaste API to paste text between two apps.
Create a macOS26 SwiftUI view using the new QuickSearch API to search files from the menu bar.
Show how to use the new WatchOS26 ActivityRing API to display daily activity rings.
Create a TVOS26 SwiftUI view using the new GameAchievementsAPI to show unlocked achievements.
Create a VisionOS26 SwiftUI view using the new HandTracking API to show hand pose.
Refactor an ObservableObject with a published array of Dates to @Observable for iOS26.
Refactor an ObservableObject with a published struct containing a Float property to @Observable for macOS26.
Refactor an ObservableObject with a published array of Strings to @Observable for watchOS26.
Refactor an ObservableObject with a published set of Doubles to @Observable for tvOS26.
Refactor an ObservableObject with a published optional Bool property to @Observable for visionOS26.
Create a WidgetKit widget for iOS26 that displays a favorite podcast, configurable via AppIntent.
Create a WidgetKit widget for iPadOS26 that displays a favorite musician, configurable via AppIntent.
Create a WidgetKit widget for macOS26 that displays a file count, configurable via AppIntent.
Create a WidgetKit widget for watchOS26 that displays a hydration streak, configurable via AppIntent.
Create a WidgetKit widget for tvOS26 that displays a favorite producer, configurable via AppIntent.
Create a WidgetKit widget for visionOS26 that displays a virtual object type, configurable via AppIntent.
Create an iOS26 SwiftUI view using the new AppShortcuts API to add a custom shortcut for a reminder.
Show how to use the new iPadOS26 SplitView API to create a five-column layout.
Create a macOS26 SwiftUI view using the new NotificationBanner API to show an info banner.
Show how to use the new WatchOS26 SleepTracking API to display sleep consistency.
Create a TVOS26 SwiftUI view using the new RemoteControl API to show remote connection status.
Create a VisionOS26 SwiftUI view using the new EyeTracking API to show eye openness.
Refactor an ObservableObject with a published array of structs with a Bool property to @Observable for iOS26.
Refactor an ObservableObject with a published struct containing a Date property to @Observable for macOS26.

Refactor an ObservableObject with a published optional String property to @Observable for visionOS26.
Create a WidgetKit widget for iOS26 that displays a favorite app, configurable via AppIntent.
Create a WidgetKit widget for iPadOS26 that displays a favorite destination, configurable via AppIntent.
Create a WidgetKit widget for macOS26 that displays a CPU load value, configurable via AppIntent.
Create a WidgetKit widget for watchOS26 that displays a heart rate zone, configurable via AppIntent.
Create a WidgetKit widget for tvOS26 that displays a favorite theme, configurable via AppIntent.
